page_metadata.biotools__summary: SCALCE (ske?lz) is fast FASTQ compression utility that utilizes locally consistent parsing for better compression rate. It achieves around 2X more compression than gzip alone.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: SCALCE (ske?lz) is fast FASTQ compression utility that utilizes locally consistent parsing for better compression rate. It achieves around 2X more compression than gzip alone.
